_meta.note: Curated catalog metadata for karma.style (name, price, tag, blurb, fabric, fit). The IMAGE map + which shots are live come from the ONE asset-library manifest — see .library. A studio re-render + gallery save updates that manifest; the next site build regenerates img/<slug>/*.webp from its APPROVED shots. Live pricing/inventory/checkout come from Hanzo Commerce (store: karma) at runtime; this file is the display fallback + curated copy.

library.consume: At BUILD (CI has the hz: rclone creds, same s3-credentials Secret as the studio mirror): pull the manifest, take assets where status=='approved' and kind in [ecom,product,lifestyle], map entry.role -> /img/<slug>/<entry.role>.webp (download entry.path under prefix, convert PNG->webp). Ignore marketing/* — that's the socials/blog queue, not the catalog. products.json (this file) supplies name/price/copy; the manifest supplies the images.

products.name: Valentina
products.blurb: Deep-wine crushed velvet with gold open-heart hardware, criss-cross hip straps and a full thigh-wrap garter. Our most-requested strappy set.

products.name: Scarlet One-Piece
products.blurb: A clean scarlet maillot with a sculpted open back. Seamless, sun-ready, and made to photograph.

products.name: Festival Fuchsia
products.blurb: Vivid hot-fuchsia with a soft draped top and tie-side brief. Built for sun, salt and long days.

products.name: Neptune Green
products.blurb: Deep sea-green with a sculpted underwire and clean high-leg lines. Editorial by day, dinner by night.

products.name: Floral Mesh
products.blurb: Botanical mesh over a lined base. Sheer where it should be, structured where it counts.

products.name: Striped Gem
products.blurb: Jewel-tone stripe with a retro balconette cut — a pool-deck classic, remade.

products.blurb: Architectural strap-work in matte black. Minimal, sharp, and quietly confident.

products.name: Scarlet

products.name: Moala One Piece in Black Mesh
products.blurb: A fun minimal suit that had a bandeau upper piece and a high-waisted bottom section. The Moala one piece is a luxurious swimsuit made with rib fabric and mesh. It is part of our Cantik (chan-tic) collection meaning beautiful in Indonesian Bahasa. Moala one piece comes with removable straps that also have adjusters. Cheeky cut back. Removable strap adjuster. Mesh/ rib fabric. Moderate coverage and support. Available in white and black.

products.name: Seychelles Bottom in Polkadot
products.blurb: The Seychelles bottom is a timeless thong that is also glamorous and flattering on the body. Tiny straps on the side and a tiny thong in the back for the cutest minimalistic bottom you need in your wardrobe. Good for tanning if you don't like tan lines. The bottom is made with the industries most luxurious lycra fabric, and high quality enough for many Summers to come. Available for pre sale in three different prints, all orders will be shipped in the end of January. Created as sustainably as possible with love. 7% of all profits are donated back to ocean conservation efforts.

Thick ribbed fabric. Durable/stretchy. Strapy detail in back for added support. Straps tie together at top. Shown in purple/mix stripe print. products.name: Malibu Bottom
products.blurb: Our favorite (and skimpiest) bottom in the Dayna X Karma collection. Synonymous with every surfer’s dream, our “Malibu” bikini set is your next step for bikini collection nirvana. We’ve taken simplicity and quality fit and created a tiny bottom. Made with micro ties for ultimate adjustability, wear high, low, or in between. The back is more than a g-string but definitely skimpy enough to be considered a thong. Alternatively, you can always mix and match the bottom for another pair in our Dayna X Karma collection.

products.name: Malibu Top
products.blurb: Synonymous with every surfer’s dream, our “Malibu” bikini set is your next step for bikini collection nirvana. We’ve taken simplicity and quality fit and infused it into this beautiful, Summery set. The top is made to accentuate any Woman with a smaller bust. Simple and easy to wear, it’s an essential you will be able to dress in seconds. A great on the-go-set, flattering and chill enough for any occasion.

products.name: Maverick Bottom
products.blurb: Inspired by one of the most deadly waves in the world, where geometry and clean lines are the backbone of the art of surf. With the Maverick we took inspiration from the simple curvature of the ocean to give you the cleanest, most comfortable cuts. The bottom fits in between cheeky and our booty cuts. The bottom sits at your hips for the most flattering bottom cut for any body type.

products.name: Maverick Top
products.blurb: The Maverick Top is named after the most beautiful yet deadly wave on the planet. Our Maverick Top is made for surf, with a perfect fit from our back buckle and our halter at the top. The underwire provides additional support, if you are bustier and have a large frame order a size up. The simplicity of this style makes it a classic. The Maverick Set is the complementary outcome of fashion and surfing.

products.name: Molokai Bottom
products.blurb: Inspired by one of the most breathtaking under rated island of Hawaii. The Molokai Bottom is complete with frills and ribbons. The youthful yet mature patterns keep you looking fun and fresh on that sweet vacay. No matter where you are going or what you are doing your figure will be rocking in these high-waisted booty cut bottom.

products.name: Molokai Top
products.blurb: Inspired by one of the most breathtaking under rated island in Hawaii. The ruffle edges on the top reminds us of the Friendly Isle that encompasses the ideals of 'old Hawaii' in which family remains the priority. The cute feminine style has ties in the front with underwire and adjusters on the back so remember to smile a lot and keep the good vibes going. Get ready to surf it up in the Molokai and remember: let the locals have the set waves.

products.name: Bae Bikini Bottom in Dragon Blossom
products.blurb: The bae bikini bottom is a flirty and fun twist to the famous triangle bikini staple, and just what you need this summer to show off that hot bod! This micro-triangle has a simple minimalist design that flatters all who want to feel sexy and look amazing. The top has adjustable ties around the waist and neck for added comfort and support. Ready for mixing and matching with our many bottoms that have the identical print. You will be ready to strut the beach and harness those “bae-watch” feels. Created as sustainably as possible with recycled fish nets and love. 7% of all profits are donated back to ocean conservation efforts

products.name: Bae Bikini Bottom in Trippy Leopard
products.blurb: Our Bae Bikini Bottom is a real head turner, one of our skimpiest and sexiest pieces of all time. Use this suit to flex and feel your best with comfort, support and fashion forward design. This micro thong is barely enough to be legal, but definitely enough to be lethal! This bottom is stretchy and brings you to a new height in comfort for bikinis. Ready for mixing and matching with our many bottoms that have the identical print. You will be ready to strut the beach and harness those “bae-watch” feels. Created as sustainably as possible with recycled fish nets and love.

products.name: Bikini-n-Chill Bottom in Dragon Blossom
products.blurb: Treat your booty right in our bikini-n-chill bottoms, cause everyone knows it's all about self-care. The bottom has thin ties that connect the front and back piece. The back is cheeky and provides ample support and coverage. This is a traditional bottom with some eccentric prints. Pair with the bikini-n-chill top or any other top within the less boring collection for a perfect match. Our bikini-n-chill bottom will surely let you tap into the simple life while recycling 90’s retro elements into your closet. Created as sustainably as possible with love. 7% of all profits are donated back to ocean conservation efforts.

The top has thin triangles that are long that extend to the top of the suit. The back straps have adjuster and reach down to connect to the front strap which ties in the center of the suit. This is a sophisticated suit that offers a bustier style, while recycling 90’s retro components back into the design. Created as sustainably as possible with recycled fish nets and love. 7% of all profits are donated back to ocean conservation efforts Shipping first week of July, presale only.

products.name: Lafayette Bikini Bottom in Trippy Leopard
products.blurb: Time to feel free in with our Italian low rise style and favorite thong cut in our Lafayette Bottom. Great for Summers spent in the Mediterranean, where basking in the sun is more like a lifestyle. Stylish enough you can even wear this alone (at the more liberal beaches in the world) and still be a standout. Add this to your cart so you can throw this in your suitcase and make it part of your next adventure. Also available for mixing and matching with our many tops that have the identical print. Created as sustainably as possible with recycled fish nets + love. 7% of all profits are donated back to ocean conservation efforts.

products.name: Lafayette Bikini Top in Dragon Blossom
products.blurb: A renewed version of our best selling Luna bikini, our most sold bikini ever! The top is completely adjustable with fixed strings that extend from the back and ties in between the two front cups. Our Lafeyette top does not come with extra padding but gives your body the look that would come from a push up style. It will flatter you in all the right ways. Ready for mixing and matching with our many bottoms that have the identical print. Created as sustainably as possible with love. 7% of all profits are donated back to ocean conservation efforts. Shipping second week of April, presale only.

products.name: Railay Bottom in Dragon Blossom
products.blurb: Timeless enough for next year. The Railay Bikini Bottom is nothing but perfect goodness. This bottom has the perfect cut and trim that shapes your booty in all the right ways. Worthy of the hottest beaches clubs in the world. Shake your booty with confidence in this elegant string bottom. The side straps are thin, and embrace a low cut 90’s look or a vintage flattering high waisted feel or just catch some rays that won’t give you some horrid tan lines. Created as sustainably as possible with love. 7% of all profits are donated back to ocean conservation efforts.

products.name: Railay Set
products.blurb: Comfy enough for those 24-7 beach feels. Honestly the Railay Set in Dragon Blossom is nothing but perfect goodness. This bottom has the perfect cut and trim that shapes your booty in all the right ways. Worthy of the hottest beach clubs in the world. Shake your booty with confidence in this elegant string bottom. The side straps are thin, and embrace a low cut 90’s look or a vintage flattering high waisted feel or just catch some rays that won’t give you some horrid tan lines. Plus the top is supportive and flattering on every bust size XS-XXL. Created as sustainably as possible with love.

products.name: Railay Top in Dragon Blossom
products.blurb: Timeless enough for next year. Pre-order the Railay top, a showstopper with a stunning plunge that is still exceptionally supportive. We made sure to find the most comfortable and high-quality underwire to avoid uncomfortable poking or prodding. To create comfort in swim tops for bustier women we created the tops accordingly with a cup that is form fitted to your frame along with adjustable features on the back. This top will make you forget you ever had any anxiety about wearing bikini tops! You could also wear this top for any water sports if you want to step up your sexy game.

products.name: Ruby Bottom in Dragon Blossom
products.blurb: The Social-Dist(raction) essential, our Ruby Beach Bikini is more then a tanning essential. Made with feminine scalloped edges and flirty ties, o ur Ruby bottoms shape and contour your waist, with support and comfort. Along the front and back of the piece we incorporated rushing detail to give the bottom even more stretch in our ultra luxurious eco-friendly fabric. The back cut is cheeky so it will give you quite a bit more coverage than our usual thong. Created as sustainably as possible with recycled fish nets + love. 7% of all profits are donated back to ocean conservation efforts Shipping first week of July, presale only.

products.name: Ruby Top in Dragon Blossom
products.blurb: The Social-Dist(raction) essential, our Ruby Beach Bikini is more then a tanning essential. A classic piece part of the Less Boring Summer Collection, made with femine scalloped edges and flirty ties. The top is a bandeau with adjustable straps that tie at the top which are also removable to give you the perfect glow, tan line free. This set is so sleek and cozy you won't want to take it off. Created as sustainably as possible with recycled fish nets + love. 7% of all profits are donated back to ocean conservation efforts

products.name: Whitehaven One Piece in Dragon Blossom
products.blurb: Inspired by the crystal clear Australian coast line. Clean cuts and soft fabric will transport you to a soft sandy beach like Whitehaven. The asymmetrical off-shoulder one-piece is appealing for every body type. We added a waistband/belt to furthermore draw attention to the waist. Sexy and elegant, with high cut holes to elongate your legs. Comfy enough to double as a body suit for a look night or day even past the poolside! Created as sustainably as possible with recycled fish nets + love. 7% of all profits are donated back to ocean conservation efforts. Shipping first week of July, presale only.

products.name: Karma Legging
products.blurb: Step into the best leggings of your life. A compressive, squat-proof, ultra-high rise compressive legging with double side pockets. Flatters and sculpts your legs!
products.fabric: Recycled compressive knit · double side pockets

products.name: Sajana Bra
products.blurb: A rectangular cut sports bra made from 10 recycled plastic bottles. Made with a seamless finish and smooth low-cut back. This top is made to lift your bust while being comfy enough to lounge in 24-7.

products.name: Shakti Bra
products.blurb: Your new favorite top. A cropped tank, sports bra hybrid with a high neckline, racerback and soft, four-way stretch fabric. Made with 12 recycled plastic bottles.

products.name: Less Boring Summer Mask in Dragon Blossom
products.blurb: This mask is so good, lightweight, breathable, chic, versatile, absorbent... that you will be wearing it long after you get back home. The perfect preventative measure to fashionably combine with your swimwear. Both masks are made with the Trippy Leopard Print and the Dragon Blossom print featured in our Less Boring Summer Collection. The ear straps are made with scrunched straps to ensure maximum adjustability and comfort. We made sure you could wear the masks all day without any discomfort to your ears. Our Guilty Pleasure Mask also have a bandana like appearance with ties behind the neck for an ultra "Playa" like feel.

products.name: Less Boring Summer Mask in Trippy Leopard
products.blurb: This mask is so good, lightweight, breathable, chic, versatile, absorbent... that you will be wearing it long after you get back home. The perfect preventative measure to fashionably combine with your swimwear. Both masks are made with the Trippy Leopard Print and the Dragon Blossom print featured in our Less Boring Summer Collection. Our Guilty Pleasure Mask also have a bandana like appearance with ties behind the neck for an ultra "Playa" like feel.

products.name: Hazy Baby Bikini
products.blurb: Be bold in this so-special, micro-bikini style and embody your modern hippie soul. So effortless in a triangle-style silhouette and v cut thong bottoms. The top features mini ties that are extra long, meant to be tied and worn in 3 styles! The sweet and simple ruched ties + sultry cuts on the bottom bring comfort, stretch and detailing. Preorder this set to receive second week of April. Each item is made to order.

products.name: Katarina Bikini Bottom
products.blurb: A basic piece that you won't regret adding to your Karma Bikini collection, or the perfect first bottom to go for. The Katarina bikini bottom is an elegant and feminine staple. The Katarina bottom ties at the sides to keep the bottom fitted perfectly while adding scrunching detail at the strings. In the back the fabric is made to be a thong cut with the strings for obvious adjustability. Size up for more coverage and size down for the vice. As always made with the most luxurious and durable swim fabric. Attention* Item is on back order, all orders will be shipped in February.

products.name: Katarina Bikini Set
products.blurb: A more adjustable and simple piece to rock in any warm tropical environment. Ties at the neck and in the back for ultimate adjustability. Bottoms have adjustable ties at side and has a cheeky cut. Made with recycled fabrics, yet extremely soft and comfortable in the water, sand, etc. Plus the fabrics are uv protected for many amazing tanning seshes to come.

products.name: Katarina Bikini Top
products.blurb: A more adjustable and simple piece to rock in any warm tropical environment. Ties at the neck and in the back for ultimate adjustability. Made with recycled fabrics, yet extremely soft and comfortable in the water, sand, etc. Plus the fabrics are uv protected for many amazing tanning seshes to come.

products.name: Luna Bikini
products.blurb: The Luna Set is s o cool and sport definitely an essential this season. The swimsuit is featured in a bandeau like top with adjusters and front ties, plus a high-waisted mid coverage bottom. D esigned for a flattering feminine fit and feel. Designed to sit above the belly button and high on the hips. With a mid-coverage back. This best seller is back with double-layered fabric and a seamless finish to sit comfortably and give the most gorgeous fit.

products.name: Nirvana Bikini
products.blurb: Back in stock version of our best selling tie dye bikini, our most flattering bikini ever! The Nirvana bikini has great support for your bust and your bum. The top is completely adjustable with fixed strings that extend from the back and ties in between the two front cups. Great support and lift even without padding. Same feel and look that comes with a push up style. It will flatter you in all the right ways especially since the bottoms are a v mid rise cut with a cheeky look in the back! Created as sustainably as possible with love. 7% of all profits are donated back to ocean conservation efforts.

products.name: Gabriella Silk Skirt
products.blurb: An effortless slinky silk skirt to upgrade any top, cut on the bias like a classic slip so it skims effortlessly over the figure. This high-waisted skirt will gracefully highlight your curves thanks to its bias cut and our signature premium Italian silk will lay on your skin like a soft caress. It's a timeless piece that if properly taken care of will last for several years. The styling options for this skirt are endless. If you look for an outfit and you want something polished yet comfortable, this is exactly what you need.

products.name: Gaia Silk Slip
products.blurb: The first piece is in collaboration with our sister brand "Spoiled Rotten." This is our designer's pick, featuring a cowl neck, spaghetti straps, and one of the highest-grade silk fabrics. Literally when you put them on these dresses are like heaven on earth. Made for midnight dancing, and romantic dinners under the stars, to live in and breathe in as our silk is one of the most lightweight, highest quality, and softest fabrics on earth. This custom hand-made silk dress is as luxurious as it is flattering. Plus we can make them order if you email us as soon as you order.

products.name: Jaimie Silk Feather Pajamas
products.blurb: Indulge in the ultimate comfort and luxurious design with our handmade, feather-trimmed pajamas crafted from the finest silk. These pajamas are both lightweight and breathable. Each set is handmade with love and care, from the fabric selection to the final stitch. And if you need a different length, or have any questions about sizing we're here to help.

products.name: Martina Silk Slip
products.blurb: The first piece is in collaboration with our sister brand "Spoiled Rotten." Made for midnight dancing, and romantic dinners under the stars, to live in and breathe in as our silk is one of the most lightweight, highest quality, and softest fabrics on earth. This custom hand-made silk dress is as luxurious as it is flattering. Plus we can make them order if you email us as soon as you order.

products.name: Sierra Silk Slip
products.blurb: 100% silk slip dress made from natural silk always looks incredibly gorgeous and expensive. Go for a long silk dress instead of a midi dress if you opt for a more bohemian and elegant look. All known "queens" 90s loved to wear maxi slips, these dressing gowns, we just got inspired. All our slip dresses are cut on the bias for a flattering effortless look on any silhouette, which makes it the perfect dress for day and night. Finished with internal french seams and a double rolled hem. Our silk dresses are made from the soft 100% silk and carefully crafted to provide the perfect, sexy and relaxed fit. ON SALE FOR PRESALE.

products.name: Mondrian Bikini Set
products.blurb: The bikini is a fun twist on a classic triangle set with beautiful earth ton es. Minimal triangle top with multi color blocking. Ties in a traditional way at the halter and in the back. Will definitely set your self apart from something boring. Tie it 3 separate ways for 3 different separate looks. A basic piece that you won't regret adding to your Karma Bikini collection. Size up for more coverage and size down for the vice. As always made with the most luxurious and durable swim fabric. -7% of profits goes to ocean conservation efforts -Sustainable packaging -100% recycalable

products.name: Shakti One Piece
products.blurb: The Karma Shakti Blue Tie-Dye One-Piece is always a seaside staple! Our first ever one piece back by popular demand. This sweet and sexy one-piece is shaped from sleek sustainable fabric and features a low-cut back, high-cut neckline, some peek-a-boo side boob, adjustable straps, and moderate back coverage. The ruched detailing on the back and front makes the suit great even as a body suit for an outwear look. Created as sustainably as possible with love. 7% of all profits are donated back to ocean conservation efforts. Pre-order now for delivery in mid April, all sets are made to order!

products.name: Skye Body Suit
products.blurb: Soak up the sun in this sweet yet sporty one piece featuring a scoop neck with crossed racer straps in the front. An elegant modern upgrade of a typical bandeau with a cheeky back cut. The suit has a high cut leg opening for an ultra-flattering look. Once you try this on you will fall in love with the ever fitting feminine back tie details. Pre-order this set to receive the second week of April. Each item is made to order.

endless-summer.title: Endless Summer
endless-summer.blurb: Dragon Blossom & Trippy Leopard — our signature statement prints. Micro-triangles, tie-sides and off-shoulder one-pieces.

bali.title: Bali
bali.blurb: Designed and made on the island of Bali. Smocked matte Indonesian lycra, limited production, glow for every skin tone.

cantik.title: Cantik
cantik.blurb: Pronounced chan-tik — Indonesian for beautiful. Ring-style tops, timeless thongs and rib-and-mesh one-pieces.

dayna-x-karma.title: Dayna x Karma
dayna-x-karma.blurb: A surf-inspired capsule — Malibu, Molokai and Maverick — where clean lines meet the curve of the wave.

lost-beach.title: Lost Beach
lost-beach.blurb: Tie-dye sets and tropical staples for the ones who wander off the map. Katarina, Luna, Nirvana, Hazy Baby.

summer-of-love.title: Summer of Love
summer-of-love.blurb: Color-blocked triangles and sculpted one-pieces. The 2019 launch, forever.

karma-sweat.title: Karma Sweat
karma-sweat.blurb: Move-in-it activewear. Squat-proof high-rise leggings and sports bras spun from recycled plastic bottles.

silk-enigma.title: Silk Enigma
silk-enigma.blurb: Bias-cut natural-silk slips, skirts and feather pajamas. Eveningwear, off duty.

less-boring-summer.title: Less Boring Summer
less-boring-summer.blurb: 2020 was dull; this wasn't. Chic printed masks cut to match your swim.
